evals.prompt: Convert NVIDIA DeepStream C++ LPR app to DL Streamer with conversion reference documentation
expected_output: Generates a working DL Streamer pipeline equivalent to the DeepStream C++ LPR app
Includes element mapping table (DeepStream elements to DL Streamer elements)
Includes side-by-side pipeline diagrams
Includes application logic comparison table
Includes model comparison table
Uses correct DL Streamer elements (gvadetect, gvaclassify, etc.)
Output code compiles or runs without syntax errors

evals.prompt: Convert DeepStream Python test4 app to DL Streamer with conversion documentation
expected_output: Generates a working DL Streamer Python pipeline equivalent to DeepStream test4
Includes element mapping table (DeepStream to DL Streamer)
Includes pipeline diagrams
Includes application logic comparison table
Includes model comparison table
Uses correct DL Streamer Python bindings or GStreamer pipeline construction
Output code runs without syntax errors

evals.prompt: Convert DeepStream nvdsanalytics test app to Python DL Streamer optimized for Intel Core Ultra
expected_output: Generates a working Python DL Streamer pipeline with zone analytics
Configures 4 rectangular zones as specified
Overlays live car counts on video
Saves annotated output video
Targets Intel Core Ultra optimization (NPU/GPU device selection)
Includes conversion reference documentation
Uses gvaanalytics or equivalent zone-counting approach

evals.prompt: Event-based smart recording pipeline with person detection triggers
expected_output: Generates a pipeline that detects people in video
Implements event-triggered recording (starts on person detection)
Saves recordings as sequenced files (save-1, save-2, etc.)
Optimizes for Intel Core Ultra 3 (correct device selection)
Includes performance validation or measurement approach
Uses appropriate DL Streamer elements for detection and recording control

evals.prompt: License plate recognition with YOLOv11 detection and PaddleOCR
expected_output: Uses YOLOv11 model for plate detection via gvadetect
Uses PaddleOCR model for character recognition via gvaclassify or gvainference
Outputs JSON with recognized plate text
Annotates video with detection results
Optimizes for Intel Core Ultra 3
Produces valid Python code that can run end-to-end

evals.prompt: Multi-RTSP-stream analysis with AI analytics, recording, and WebRTC output
expected_output: Handles multiple RTSP camera source inputs
Applies object detection AI analytics to streams
Implements dynamic recording control
Outputs combined streams via WebRTC
Uses correct DL Streamer multi-stream elements or patterns
Pipeline structure is logically sound for parallel stream processing

evals.prompt: People detection and tracking bash script with YOLO26m and Mars re-ID
expected_output: Generates a bash script with a valid GStreamer pipeline
Uses YOLO26m model for person detection
Uses Mars-Small-128 model for re-identification in gvatrack
Annotates output video with tracking results
Optimizes for Intel Core Ultra 3 (correct device property)
Pipeline includes gvadetect, gvatrack, and gvawatermark elements

evals.prompt: Multi-stream pose estimation with 4 YOLO models composed into single output
expected_output: Generates a bash script processing 4 video streams
Uses distinct YOLO pose models (YOLO26n/11n/8n/8l) per stream
Annotates each stream with keypoints and model name labels
Merges 4 streams into a combined/composed output
Optimizes for Intel Core Ultra 3
Uses compositor or equivalent for multi-stream composition

evals.prompt: Worker safety compliance monitoring with YOLO detection and VLM analysis
expected_output: Uses YOLO26m for worker detection and tracking
Crops detected regions for VLM analysis
Uses Qwen2.5-VL-3B (or equivalent VLM) for helmet/harness compliance checking
Alerts only on clear violations (avoids false positives)
Saves annotated images and JSON logs
Combines gvadetect, gvatrack, and gvagenai elements appropriately
